question: Which expansion team played their second full NHL season in 2023-24?
explanation: The Kraken, who joined the NHL in 2021-22, continued to build their roster and fanbase in Seattle!

question: Which NHL franchise relocated from Arizona to Salt Lake City before the 2024-25 season?
options: Arizona Coyotes became Utah Hockey Club
correct_answer: Arizona Coyotes became Utah Hockey Club
explanation: The Coyotes relocated to Salt Lake City and became the Utah Hockey Club starting in the 2024-25 season!

question: Which player scored the most goals in the 2023 NHL Playoffs for the Golden Knights?
explanation: Marchessault was the playoff hero, winning the Conn Smythe as playoff MVP with his clutch goals!

question: Which player won the 2023 Calder Trophy as NHL Rookie of the Year?
explanation: Matty Beniers won the Calder Trophy with the Seattle Kraken, capping an impressive rookie campaign!

question: Which player led the NHL in goals during the 2024-25 season?
explanation: Draisaitl continued his elite scoring with the Oilers, leading the league in goals in 2024-25!

question: Which team had the most wins in the NHL during the 2022-23 regular season?
explanation: The Bruins set an NHL record with 65 wins in the 2022-23 season, though they were upset in the playoffs!

question: How many regular-season wins did the Boston Bruins record in 2022-23, setting an all-time NHL record?
explanation: The Bruins won a record 65 games, breaking the previous record of 62 set by the 1995-96 Red Wings!

question: Which team upset the record-setting Bruins in the first round of the 2023 NHL Playoffs?
explanation: The Panthers stunned the record-setting Bruins with a first-round upset, one of the biggest in NHL playoff history!

question: Which player won the 2023 Vezina Trophy as the NHL's best goaltender?
explanation: Linus Ullmark won the Vezina Trophy in 2023 with a league-best save percentage and goals-against average!

question: Which defenseman had 103 points in the 2022-23 season for the San Jose Sharks?
explanation: Erik Karlsson's 101-point season was one of the best by a defenseman in decades, earning him the Norris Trophy!

question: Which team won the 2024 President's Trophy for the best regular-season record?
explanation: The Rangers won the Presidents' Trophy in 2024, but were eliminated in the Eastern Conference Final!

question: Which player won the 2024 Maurice Richard Trophy for most goals in the regular season?
explanation: Matthews won the Rocket Richard Trophy with 69 goals, the highest total in over 30 years!

question: Which team signed free agent forward Sam Reinhart to a big extension in 2024?
explanation: Reinhart re-signed with the Panthers after helping them win the Stanley Cup in 2024!

question: Which team signed veteran center Mark Scheifele as a free agent before the 2024-25 season?
explanation: Scheifele left the Jets and signed with Nashville, joining Steven Stamkos in a Predators spending spree!

question: Which Winnipeg Jets player led the team in scoring during the 2024-25 season?
explanation: Kyle Connor continued to be one of the NHL's top goal scorers with his lethal shot and skating ability!
